TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kutu, title = Kutu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kutu} }

S.FORM: Kutu Ira ko kotu noni Nana'unen tu adada atu piadah Ira ku sepatay a daduduen: Sakacacay, mivaca' tu fuduy, ulay atu tatangalan, mililuc tu remiremi'ad. Sakatusa, aka pilingid tu sikutuay a tamdaw, aka piiyong tu sakadat, tuper, fuduy atu tatangalan etc. Sakatulu, dengay hen a misawsaw tu vukes, anu saremi'ad sa a misawsaw i, maluwan ku simal nu vukes, a cikutu tu. Sakasepat, anu miiyung tu siiyuay a sapikalulu i, manga'ay a mipatay tu kutu. U mimingay la'ed a sakadat ku sapikadat tu vukes, maala ku vitaul nu kutu. Kaurira, sulinga'en a misawsaw ku sakadat anu maherek.
S.PHON: ko~u~uto~u~u ira ko~u ko~uto~u~u no~uni nanaʡo~u~unən to~u~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ato~u~u piaɬ~ɮaħ ira ko~u~u səpataj a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uən: sakaʦaʦaj, mib~vaʦaʡ to~u~u fo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj, o~u~uɾaj ato~u~u tataŋaɾan, miɾiɾo~u~uʦ to~u~u rəmirəmiʡaɬ~ɮ. sakato~u~usa, aka piɾiŋiɬ~ɮ to~u~u siko~u~uto~u~uaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, aka piijo~uŋ to~u~u sakaɬ~ɮat, to~u~upər, fo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj ato~u~u tataŋaɾan ətʦ. sakato~u~uɾo~u~u, ɬ~ɮəŋaj ħən a misawsaw to~u~u b~vo~u~ukəs, ano~u~u sarəmiʡaɬ~ɮ sa a misawsaw i, maɾo~u~uwan ko~u~u simaɾ no~u~u b~vo~u~ukəs, a ʦiko~u~uto~u~u to~u~u. sakasəpat, ano~u~u miijo~u~uŋ to~u~u siijo~u~uaj a sapikaɾo~u~uɾo~u~u i, maŋaʡaj a mipataj to~u~u ko~u~uto~u~u. o~u~u mimiŋaj ɾaʡəɬ~ɮ a sakaɬ~ɮat ko~u~u sapikaɬ~ɮat to~u~u b~vo~u~ukəs, maaɾa ko~u~u b~vitao~u~uɾ no~u~u ko~u~uto~u~u. kao~u~urira, so~u~uɾiŋaʡən a misawsaw ko~u~u sakaɬ~ɮat ano~u~u maħərək.
S.FORM: Kutu Ira ko kotu noni Nana'unen tu adada atu piadah Ira ku sepatay a daduduen: Sakacacay, mivaca' tu fuduy, ulay atu tatangalan, mililuc tu remiremi'ad. Sakatusa, aka pilingid tu sikutuay a tamdaw, aka piiyong tu sakadat, tuper, fuduy atu tatangalan etc. Sakatulu, dengay hen a misawsaw tu vukes, anu saremi'ad sa a misawsaw i, maluwan ku simal nu vukes, a cikutu tu. Sakasepat, anu miiyung tu siiyuay a sapikalulu i, manga'ay a mipatay tu kutu. U mimingay la'ed a sakadat ku sapikadat tu vukes, maala ku vitaul nu kutu. Kaurira, sulinga'en a misawsaw ku sakadat anu maherek.
S.PHON: ko~u~uto~u~u ira ko~u ko~uto~u~u no~uni nanaʡo~u~unən to~u~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ato~u~u piaɬ~ɮaħ ira ko~u~u səpataj a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uən: sakaʦaʦaj, mib~vaʦaʡ to~u~u fo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj, o~u~uɾaj ato~u~u tataŋaɾan, miɾiɾo~u~uʦ to~u~u rəmirəmiʡaɬ~ɮ. sakato~u~usa, aka piɾiŋiɬ~ɮ to~u~u siko~u~uto~u~uaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, aka piijo~uŋ to~u~u sakaɬ~ɮat, to~u~upər, fo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj ato~u~u tataŋaɾan ətʦ. sakato~u~uɾo~u~u, ɬ~ɮəŋaj ħən a misawsaw to~u~u b~vo~u~ukəs, ano~u~u sarəmiʡaɬ~ɮ sa a misawsaw i, maɾo~u~uwan ko~u~u simaɾ no~u~u b~vo~u~ukəs, a ʦiko~u~uto~u~u to~u~u. sakasəpat, ano~u~u miijo~u~uŋ to~u~u siijo~u~uaj a sapikaɾo~u~uɾo~u~u i, maŋaʡaj a mipataj to~u~u ko~u~uto~u~u. o~u~u mimiŋaj ɾaʡəɬ~ɮ a sakaɬ~ɮat ko~u~u sapikaɬ~ɮat to~u~u b~vo~u~ukəs, maaɾa ko~u~u b~vitao~u~uɾ no~u~u ko~u~uto~u~u. kao~u~urira, so~u~uɾiŋaʡən a misawsaw ko~u~u sakaɬ~ɮat ano~u~u maħərək.
